title: Server
description: A physical machine, VM, router, or appliance managed by this homelab. Servers are the deployment targets for services.

parent.description: Key of the parent server (e.g. 'au'). Public IPs are inherited from the parent chain up to 2 levels deep, allowing VMs and containers to share the host's public address.

platform.description: Provisioning platform. Controls which Terraform resources are created. incus = Incus container/VM; oci = Oracle Cloud instance; truenas = TrueNAS app; unifi = UniFi device; unmanaged = externally managed (DNS and secrets only).

type.description: Functional role of the server. Used for grouping in monitoring (Gatus) and display. appliance = dedicated device; router = network gateway; server = general-purpose machine; vm = virtual machine.

features.description: Feature flags that provision additional resources for this server.

b2.description: Provision a Backblaze B2 bucket and application key. Exposes b2_bucket_name, b2_application_key_id, b2_application_key_sensitive, and b2_endpoint.

cloudflare_acme_token.description: Create a scoped Cloudflare API token with Zone DNS Edit permissions on the ACME domain. Exposes cloudflare_acme_account_id and cloudflare_acme_token_sensitive for DNS-01 challenge clients.

cloudflare_proxy.description: Enable Cloudflare proxying on DNS records for this server.

cloudflare_zero_trust_tunnel.description: Create a Cloudflare Zero Trust tunnel. Exposes cloudflare_zero_trust_tunnel_token_sensitive. Services targeting this server with cloudflare_proxy enabled route through this tunnel.

docker.description: This server runs Docker and can host Komodo-managed stacks. Adds the server to the Komodo server list.

password.description: Generate a random admin password. Exposes password_sensitive and password_hash_sensitive (bcrypt). Stored in Bitwarden.

resend.description: Provision a Resend API key for outbound email. Exposes resend_api_key_sensitive.

tailscale.description: Generate a Tailscale auth key. Exposes tailscale_auth_key_sensitive for use in cloud-init or startup scripts.

description.description: Optional longer description of this server's purpose.

name.description: Short hostname component used to build the server FQDN. For region-prefixed keys (e.g. au-malatang) this is the part after the hyphen (malatang). Must be lowercase alphanumeric or hyphen.

region.description: Two-letter region code (e.g. au, us). Combined with identity.name to form the FQDN: {name}.{region}.{domain}.

title.description: Display name shown in dashboards, Komodo, and Bitwarden (e.g. 'Malatang').

username.description: Primary admin username for SSH access. Stored in Bitwarden alongside the generated password. Defaults to 'root'.

networking.description: Network addressing for this server. Public IPs are used for external DNS records; Tailscale IPs are resolved automatically from the tailnet.

management_address.description: Hostname or IP for management access (e.g. Incus API endpoint). Used by Komodo as the server address.

management_port.description: Port for management access. Defaults to 443.

public_address.description: Public CNAME target (e.g. a dynamic DNS hostname). Creates a CNAME external DNS record instead of A/AAAA. Inherited from the parent chain up to 2 levels.

public_ipv4.description: Public IPv4 address. Creates an A record on the external domain. Inherited from the parent chain up to 2 levels.

public_ipv6.description: Public IPv6 address (bare, without prefix length). Creates an AAAA record on the external domain. Inherited from the parent chain up to 2 levels.

platform_config.description: Platform-specific configuration. Only the block matching the server's platform is used.

incus.description: Configuration for Incus-managed containers and VMs.

image.description: Incus image to use (e.g. 'ubuntu:24.04'). Null uses the platform default.

nested.description: Enable nested containerisation (security.nesting). Only applies to containers.

privileged.description: Run as a privileged container (security.privileged). Only applies to containers.

secureboot.description: Enable Secure Boot (security.secureboot). Only applies to virtual machines.

disks.description: Additional disk devices to attach to this instance.

name.description: Device name. Defaults to disk-{n} if omitted.

networks.description: Network interface devices to attach to this instance.

mac_address.description: Fixed MAC address (hwaddr). Leave unset for a random address.

name.description: Device name. Defaults to eth-{n} if omitted.

pci_devices.description: PCI devices to pass through to this instance.

name.description: Device name. Defaults to pci-{n} if omitted.

profiles.description: Incus profiles to apply to this instance. Defaults to ['default'].

usb_devices.description: USB devices to pass through to this instance.

mode.description: File mode for the device node (e.g. '0666').

name.description: Device name. Defaults to usb-{n} if omitted.

productid.description: USB product ID as a 4-digit hex string (e.g. '1234').

vendorid.description: USB vendor ID as a 4-digit hex string (e.g. '5678').

oci.description: Configuration for Oracle Cloud Infrastructure instances.

assign_public_ip.description: Assign a public IPv4 address to the primary VNIC.

image_id.description: OCI image OCID to use as the boot volume source.

ingress_ports.description: TCP and UDP ports open in the network security group ingress rules. Defaults to [22, 80, 443].
